svg.text: EIA weekly storage · CFTC CoT report
Jenkins-scheduled Python jobs scrape each source, then
normalize to Dth/d on the Pacific gas day
Analyst uploads the daily ICE export each business morning
Cloud flow polls NOAA & internal met feeds
Every flow logs status, row counts & freshness —
Teams alert on failure or stale data
raw/ — source docs kept beside their
Each stream lands in its own path — clean lineage
One native SharePoint connection · event-driven refresh —
Power Automate triggers the dataset as files land
Basin pricing · spreads · utilization → sector disposition
Mirrors the dashboard mockup — one executive view
